dns-debug.description: DNS troubleshooting -- when resolution is the problem

commands.comment: A and AAAA records -- what IPs does this resolve to?
authoritative nameservers -- wrong NS = wrong answers
compare Google vs Cloudflare DNS -- catches propagation issues
SOA record -- serial number reveals if zone was updated
all records at once -- some resolvers block this
walk the full delegation chain from root -- finds broken links
CAA records -- which CAs can issue certs for this domain
